nasb.text: and may God Almighty grant you compassion in the sight of the man, so that he will release to you your other brother and Benjamin. And as for me, if I am bereaved of my children, I am bereaved.”

esv.text: May God Almighty  grant you mercy before the man, and may he send back your other brother and Benjamin. And as for me, if I am bereaved of my children, I am bereaved.”

cnv.text: 願全能的　神使那人憐憫你們，給你們釋放你們那個兄弟和便雅憫。至於我，如果要喪失兒子，就喪失了吧。”

ccb.text: 愿全能的上帝叫那人怜悯你们，让西缅和便雅悯回来。我若丧子就丧子吧！”

csbs.text: 愿全能的神使你们在那人面前蒙怜悯，好让他可以把你们那个兄弟和本雅明都交还给你们。至于我，如果要丧失儿子，就丧失吧！”
